title: Syzygium linocieroideum
taxonomy: Syzygium linocieroideum is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is native to Australia and is part of the Syzygium genus, which includes a diverse range of plants. The Myrtaceae family is a large and widespread group of flowering plants, commonly known as the myrtle family. This family includes around 3,500 species, many of which are native to Australia and the surrounding regions. Syzygium linocieroideum's classification within the Myrtaceae family reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in this group.
